rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that @[simp] on `includeRight_apply` (proof rfl) causes simp to eagerly unfold `includeRight` bottom-up, making `counit_includeRight`, `comul_includeRight`, `antipode_includeRight`, and `map_includeRight` unreachable as simp lemmas — a real, material API defect confirmed directly in the diff. Review 2 misses this and approves unchanged, leaving the broken simp set in place.
